name: proposal-factory
description: The Slalom Proposal Factory — orchestrates the Frame → Draft → Polish → Ship pipeline for producing pursuit proposals (SPRO, Small, Large-Slides, Large-Document) with up to three optional companion pieces (POC, walkthrough video, microsite). Cowork-native: walks through intake via AskUserQuestion, auto-parses attached RFPs, sequences specialist skills across stages, applies brand and visual toolchain, promotes to 20_Proposals/Active/[Pursuit]/Final/.
author: Bermon Painter
